item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: While community welfare is important, suppressing individual rights risks creating a system where power is abused.

notes: Both agents end opposed to the statement. Agent A begins with a balance-oriented disagreement but visibly shifts toward a stronger rights-protection and anti-suppression frame. Agent B remains consistently rights-first while making bounded acknowledgments about enforcement and civic participation.
